name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause missed discounts. We provide a cash flow forecasting system instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Cash flow gaps due to fluctuating sales and expenses.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Cash flow gaps due to fluctuating sales and expenses.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause missed discounts. We provide a cash flow forecasting system instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
